parsed_review.summary: CP00-869 is a clean, internally consistent descriptor-only RP28 Marketplace evidence-review closeout Claude bridge pack (150 units, RP28.P08.M06.S09-RP28.P09.M03.S22, risk C). Source-level inspection of all six changed files (contract JSON, README, registry.js, validators.js, model.test.js, validate-rp28 script) plus the live plan, manifest, and review harness supports the pack-level descriptor-verified claim. Coverage is exact: deliverable (42/15/73/8/8/4), phase (P08:88, P09:62), micro-phase, micro-title, and section-row counts all sum to 150 and are enforced by validateMarketplaceCp869...Coverage against the LIVE closeout-pack-plan entry (not a self-referential stub; the test planPack helper reads the live plan first). No-real-data/no-write/descriptor-only boundaries are enforced redundantly: createRow sets all 20+ guard flags to safe values, ROW_EXTRAS never flips a guarded flag to an unsafe value, and the descriptor validator independently re-checks every row for descriptor_only=true, runtime_execution=false, and absence of connector secrets/OAuth/prompt-completion/real-client-data/permission-detail/audit-body, plus no runtime opening or product/permission/audit writes. Authority boundary holds: claude_is_final_approval=false, Claude packet read_only=true and promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true with runtime deferred to CP00-870. Hermes packet emits_runtime_receipt=false and writes_product_state=false, confirming control-plane review packet/receipt handling only, not product runtime. The production_ready_flag is scoped to marketplace_evidence_review_closeout_claude_bridge_descriptor_verified; manifest/command-evidence/construction-inspection all report production_ready=false and runtime_ready=false, so there is no runtime or enterprise-trust overreach. Upstream/downstream chain (CP00-868 -> CP00-869 -> CP00-870/RP28.P09.M04.S01) is correct and enforced. The review harness implements CP178+ hardening (rejects auth failures, 0-byte stdout, malformed JSON, fenced JSON with prose, tool-call-shaped output, permission denials, and missing required fields). All referenced helper symbols and exports exist. blocks_goal_closeout is false: this CP makes no runtime or enterprise-trust claim, and the human final-approval boundary is expected and outside this receipt. No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings.
